author: muhtasham
name: Rank-0 GPTQ Serialization + No-TTT CaseOps Ablation
blurb: Non-record control run on the PR #1855 CaseOps/LQER/SparseAttnGate stack with validation-time TTT disabled and rank-0-only GPTQ serialization enabled. The run preserves full validation and full artifact accounting, stays under 16 MB, and documents the cost/quality impact of removing phased TTT while avoiding duplicated GPTQ serialization work.
technique_summary: PR #1855 CaseOps/LQER/SparseAttnGate stack, TTT disabled, full validation, PPM disabled, per-group lrzip compression, rank-0-only GPTQ serialization option.
